creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Is hardcoding TLS to 1.2 still necessary? It prevents py-matrix-synapse on FreeBSD to communicate with other homeservers over TLSv1.3. There's feedback in synapse's github that removal of post-patch results in functional synapse, at least on 14.1-RELEASE:

https://github.com/element-hq/synapse/issues/17046#issuecomment-2160036426
